refund_policies.reason: Free plans are not eligible for refunds as no payment is made.
Basic plan users can request a refund within 14 days of purchase.
exceptions: Refund not applicable if service has been fully used.
Refund not applicable for partial months.

refund_policies.reason: Premium plan users can request a refund within 30 days of purchase.
exceptions: Refund not applicable if account has violated Terms of Service.
Refund not applicable for add-on purchases.

refund_policies.reason: Enterprise clients can request a refund within 60 days subject to contract terms.
exceptions: Refund terms may vary based on signed contract.
Must be approved by account manager.
